"Neon Enigma"

...themes of identity and perception, using light and pattern to blur the lines between the physical and the digital. The swirling spirals symbolize the complexity of the mind and the endless possibilities of human imagination. The figure’s expressive pose and striking appearance invite viewers to reflect on the enigma of human existence in a technologically advanced world...
